title: Time to Look at SHI in a New Light | Thai Lee | 15 comments
text:
* Get the app

  

# Thai Lee’s Post

[Thai Lee](https://www.linkedin.com/in/thai-lee-98b5561?trk=public_post_feed-actor-name)

4y Edited

[https://lnkd.in/eZE7WRqV](https://lnkd.in/eZE7WRqV?trk=public_post-text) I am excited to announce that today we enter a new chapter at SHI as we launch our new brand identity. An identity that is both fit for the technology solutions provider we have become and the innovator we will continue to be in the future. If you still see SHI as a traditional reseller, maybe it's time to look at SHI in a new light... [\](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fweareshi&trk=public_post-text) [https://lnkd.in/eDQAyJG3](https://lnkd.in/eDQAyJG3?trk=public_post-text)

[SHI International Corp.](https://www.linkedin.com/company/shi-international-corp-?trk=public_post_reshare_feed-actor-name)

159,777 followers

4y

We have entered a new era. Our new brand reflects 32 years of organic growth and private ownership, making it both one of the most successful technology solutions providers in the world as well as the largest Minority and Woman-Owned Business Enterprise (MWBE) in the United States. If you still see SHI as a traditional reseller of computer software and IT hardware, it's time to look at SHI in a new light... [https://lnkd.in/eiupkue8](https://lnkd.in/eiupkue8?trk=public_post_reshare-text) [\](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fweareshi&trk=public_post_reshare-text)

##### Time to Look at SHI in a New Light

[Gil Gonzalez](https://au.linkedin.com/in/gilgonzalezwrep?trk=public_post_comment_actor-name) 10mo

[Thai Lee](https://www.linkedin.com/in/thai-lee-98b5561?trk=public_post_comment-text) : I love that you were the head of HR for the first 10 years and involved in hiring the first 1000 people. That your forst hire still works there after 32 years of evolution speaks volumes. 👏🏼🐨💚🖖🏼
